_comment: V11 Unity review captures. NOT device evidence. device_validated=false on every entry. visual_profile note is an honest finding: the guided-story surface is not yet OST-token-aware.

captures.visual_profile: XrealOstBright(global); guided-story player uses its own hardcoded palette + white labels and does NOT consume the token profile (finding)
captures.camera_bg: dark(0.035,0.045,0.065) — OST sims composite over real backgrounds
